characters.appearance: Young adult female with a slim build and fair complexion. She has dark hair styled in a tight, high bun. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid, light pink hooded sweatshirt throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Eager, attentive, and slightly hesitant when making mistakes.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a glossy white casing. It has glowing blue eyes and exposed mechanical details in the neck area. The face is sculpted to resemble human features but remains distinctly robotic.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; its white robotic casing serves as its exterior.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English सीखने का सबसे पहला rule क्या है? [What is the first rule of learning English?]
Character B says: सिर्फ grammar मत रटो, उसे बोलना शुरू करो! तुम्हें बस रोज़ practice करनी है। [Don't just memorize grammar, start speaking it! You just need to practice daily.]
Character A says: लेकिन किसके साथ? [But with whom?]
Character B says: Supernova AI tutor के साथ। [With Supernova AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common question about learning English.
- Shifts the focus from studying grammar to active speaking practice.
- Introduces Supernova AI as the accessible solution for conversation practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: ENGLISH सीखने का पहला RULE क्या है? सिर्फ रटो मत, बोलना शुरू करो! रोज़ PRACTICE करो! लेकिन किसके साथ? SUPERNOVA AI के साथ।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Umm.. I have 22. [Umm.. I have 22.]
Character B says: क्या आप "I'm 22" बोलना चाहती थीं? [Did you mean to say "I'm 22"?]
Character A says: हाँ बिल्कुल, 'I'm 22'. [Yes exactly, 'I'm 22'.]
Character B says: Neha, where are you from? [Neha, where are you from?]
Character A says: Uhh... I am India. [Uhh... I am India.]
Character B says: Good try Neha, लेकिन सही तरीका है: "I am from India". [Good try Neha, but the correct way is: "I am from India".]
Character A says: Sorry, मैं अक्सर ये गलती कर देती हूँ। I am from India. [Sorry, I often make this mistake. I am from India.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं! ऐसे ही रोज़ साथ में बोलकर practice करेंगे, तो English एकदम perfect हो जाएगी। [No worries! If we practice speaking together like this every day, your English will become absolutely perfect.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core app experience through a realistic, relatable mistake-correction loop.
- Shows the AI tutor's warm, non-judgmental, and encouraging tone.
- Builds confidence by emphasizing that daily practice leads to improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: How old are you? Umm.. I have 22 ❌ क्या आप "I'm 22" बोलना चाहती थीं? हाँ बिल्कुल, 'I'm 22' ✅ Neha, where are you from? Uhh... I am India ❌ Good try Neha, लेकिन सही तरीका है: "I am from India" Sorry, मैं अक्सर ये गलती कर देती हूँ। I am from India ✅ कोई बात नहीं! रोज़ practice करेंगे, तो English perfect हो जाएगी।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear call-to-action to download the app.
- Reinforces the brand name and availability on app stores.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही DOWNLOAD करें! Supernova के साथ बोलना शुरू करें। Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play.
